metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugins by Lucas Pimentel

plugins.name: lucas-dev-tools
plugins.description: Developer workflow utilities: git commits, PR reviews, PR comments, docs updates, clipboard helpers

plugins.name: windows-notify
plugins.description: Windows/WSL only. Shows Windows toast notifications when Claude Code needs attention

plugins.name: chezmoi
plugins.description: Chezmoi dotfile management: diff resolution, file sync between source and destination

plugins.name: windows-terminal
plugins.description: Windows/WSL only. Windows Terminal pane and tab management via wt.exe

plugins.name: linters
plugins.description: Runs linters on edited files: cslint (.cs), PSScriptAnalyzer (.ps1), shellcheck (.sh)
